title: Chef Aid 24cm / 9.5 Inch Long Handled Metal Sieve, Kitchen Essential Tool and Ideal for Straining, draining, Washing and Wide Range of Foods, with a fine mesh for Ease of use
features: EVERYDAY BASIC: The Chef Aid metal kitchen strainer is an everyday essential items and perfect for home use
STRAINING: This Kitchen tool is perfect for Rinsing and Straining a variety of foods to include Rice, Grain, Pulse Beans, Fruits and Vegetables
24CM DIAMETER: Measuring 24cm / 9.5 Inch in diameter this is ideal for separting and washing Pulse Beans, Rice, Fruit and Vegetbles, the built in rest will help the sieve sit over the bowl
HANDWASH: Handwashing suggested to keep you item in pristine condition
CHEF AID: Offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
